training_method: closed-form ordinary least squares (no external ML library)
provenance: Coefficients computed directly from the training_data array above via the standard OLS formulas: slope = (n*sum_xy - sum_x*sum_y) / (n*sum_x2 - sum_x^2), intercept = (sum_y - slope*sum_x) / n. Deterministic and reproducible by any reader from the embedded data alone.
